body:
Sofia,

Caminé tres millas esta mañana antes del turno — salida del sol completa, nothing better. I've been going back and forth on whether to swap Tuesdays to yoga instead of the walk, but honestly the beach wins every time. I just need you to tell me I'm not being ridiculous for even considering a 5:45am hot flow class before a ten-hour shift.

Vale, I know the answer. The walk stays.

The reason I'm even asking is Valentina has volleyball Tuesdays now and if I do the walk I'm cutting it close for pickup. I may need to rearrange with Diego's schedule — still figuring it out. But I wanted a second opinion before I locked anything in.

Llámame tonight if you can, or just reply here.

Besos,
Liz

Liz,

You already knew the answer before you finished typing the question. The walk stays. A 5:45am hot yoga class before a concierge shift at the Palmetto Grand is not self-care, it's a cry for help. I say this as your sister and as someone who loves you.

For Valentina's pickup — can Camila cover one Tuesday a month? You've done enough favors for that woman, she owes you at least four school runs. Just a thought.

Y oye, I'm in Miami the weekend of the 12th. If you're on a morning shift Saturday I will absolutely join the beach walk. Three miles is not ideal but I'll survive. Set me a time.

Te quiero,
Sof

Sofia,

Mamá called me at 6:47 this morning instead of 7:15 — right in the middle of my beach walk. I picked up, obviously, but we need to lock in a consistent window because I cannot be running back to my phone every few minutes before a shift. She sounded fine, just wanted to talk about the plantains she made. Nothing urgent.

I'm on AM shifts Tuesday through Friday this week, so if you can confirm with her that 7:30 is the new target time, that would help. After 7:30 I'm usually already at Palmetto Grand and the floor gets loud fast.

Also — she mentioned her knee again. Did she say anything to you about it?

— Eli

Eli,

Entendí, I'll call her tonight and set the 7:30 expectation. I already tried last week but she says 7:30 feels 'too late in the morning.' You know how she is — she's been up since 5 AM her whole life and thinks everyone else should be too.

About the knee — she told me it's been stiff when she wakes up. She hasn't called the doctor yet because she says it's 'nothing serious.' I think it needs to be us who pushes her to make the appointment, because she won't do it on her own. Can you bring it up on your call tomorrow? Coming from you it lands differently.

Also, are we still doing wine night with Camila this week? I feel like I haven't seen you in forever.

— Sofi

Sofia,

Yes, I'll bring up the knee tomorrow. I'll keep it short — she shuts down if it feels like an intervention. I'll just ask casually after she tells me about whatever she cooked.

Wine night is Thursday, not Friday — Camila confirmed on WhatsApp yesterday. I already moved Valentina's volleyball pickup to Diego's day, so I'm clear after 7 PM. Don't be late.

Llámala esta noche sobre el horario. The 7:30 thing is not negotiable for me on AM weeks.

— Eli

Sofia,

Siguiendo up on the shift swap I mentioned — I still don't have confirmation from scheduling on whether I'm AM or PM Thursday through Saturday this week. I need to know by tomorrow morning porque if I'm on AM, I have to arrange pickup for Valentina's volleyball practice Thursday at 4. Camila already flagged that our wine night Friday might also be a problem if I'm pulling a closing shift, and I'd rather sort that now than scramble at 6 PM.

Can you check with Marcos if the system updated after last week's adjustment? The portal is still showing the old pattern and I'm not going to plan around a ghost schedule.

Gracias,
Elizabeth

Liz,

I pulled your schedule from the back-end — Marcos confirmed it posted last night, the portal just hasn't refreshed on your end yet. You're AM Thursday and Friday (7–3:30), then PM Saturday (2–11). So Thursday pickup for Valentina is fine, and Friday you're clear well before wine night.

Saturday PM is the only real flag. If that's a conflict, Marcos said there's a swap option with Daniela, but you'd need to confirm with her directly by EOD today — she's been asking around for an AM slot.

Let me know if you want me to send you the updated PDF or if the portal fix is enough.

Sofia

Sof,

Perfecto, that's what I needed. I'll reach out to Daniela about Saturday — I'd rather keep the swap clean than owe Marcos a favor. The PM shift works if she takes it; I just can't have an open Saturday night hanging over the week.

One more thing — I'm doing Mamá's call first thing Thursday morning like always, so I'll be offline until 7:20 at the earliest. Can you make sure the front desk knows I don't want a briefing call before 7:30? Last week someone called at 7:05 and it cut into her time.

Gracias, en serio. You always find the thing faster than I do.

E.

Elizabeth,

Already messaged the front desk — noted on the Thursday morning window, no contact before 7:30. I flagged it as a standing preference so it doesn't become a weekly conversation.

Also heads up: Daniela responded fast, she's in for the Saturday swap. I CC'd you both on a thread so Marcos can log it officially. You just need to reply-all to confirm and it's done.

You're set. Go enjoy the beach walk before your shift.

Sofia

Sofi,

Necesito que cubroas el pickup de Valentina el jueves. Tengo turno de mañana esa semana — termino a las 4 pero hay un grupo VIP que llega del Palmetto Grand Miami Beach y no puedo salir hasta que estén acomodados. La práctica termina a las 5:15 en el Bayfront Recreation Center, estacionamiento en la calle 3.

She has her bag packed beforehand, so you don't have to go back to the apartment. Just drop her at the house and leave the key under the mat if I'm not there yet. I'll text you when I'm on my way out.

Dime si tienes conflicto. I'd ask Camila but she has wine night that evening and I'm not pulling her from that.

Gracias,
Liz

Liz,

Covered. Jueves, 5:15, Bayfront Recreation Center — I know the parking, I've done it before. I'll text you when I have her in the car.

Does she need dinner after, or are you handling that once you get home? Last time I fed her and then you fed her again and she was insufferable about it all weekend. Just tell me what you need and I'll do exactly that.

Also — mami called me this morning asking if Valentina is still doing the spring tournament. She wants to come watch. Let me know the date when you have it so I can coordinate her flight before she books something ridiculous.

Te veo el jueves.
Sofi

Sofia,

The WhatsApp Business API integration we talked through last month — still not live on the guest-facing side. I need a status update before this Friday. We have a full VIP block checking in Saturday morning and I am not managing arrival comms through three separate channels.

Right now everything routes through the concierge desk line, que funciona, until it doesn't. Friday I'm covering solo — AM shift bleeds into evening — and I need that direct guest messaging flow operational before the weekend hits. The whole point of the API was to cut response lag on late-night requests without it landing on whoever's at the desk.

¿Qué está bloqueando esto? If you need something from our side — credentials, IT contact, signed authorization — tell me and I'll have it to you within the hour.

— Elizabeth Robles
Senior Concierge | Palmetto Grand Resort & Spa, Miami

Elizabeth,

Thank you for following up — I should have reached out sooner. The delay is on our end. Meta flagged Palmetto Grand's business verification tier during the API approval review, and we had to resubmit with updated documentation confirming the resort's legal entity. That cleared yesterday, so we're back in the queue. Expected approval window is 48 to 72 hours from this morning.

What I need from you to move immediately on the technical side: the primary WhatsApp number you want guest messages routing to, and your IT contact so I can send the webhook endpoint spec directly. Once they confirm the endpoint config, we can flip the switch the same day Meta approves.

I'll email you the moment status changes. Gracias por la paciencia, I know the timing is tight.

— Sofia Reyes-Canton
Integrations Support

Sofia,

IT contact is Marco Fuentes — marco.fuentes@palmettogrand.com. Cópialo directamente, he's in by 7 AM and will turn the webhook config around same day, no escalation needed.

The number is the one registered under the resort's main business account — I've already confirmed with front office that it's active and verified. Marco has those credentials on file.

48 to 72 hours works if we're live before Saturday morning. If that window slips past Friday night I need to know Thursday so I can build a workaround — I'm not going into that weekend blind. Send me a WhatsApp when it clears, or email, either way.

— Elizabeth
Senior Concierge | Palmetto Grand Resort & Spa, Miami

Sofia,

Still waiting on the OAuth token issue I flagged last Thursday. The Gmail API integration I set up to pull VIP guest confirmation emails into our concierge dashboard stopped authenticating Tuesday — 401 loop, no refresh token. I need this resolved before the weekend; full house incoming and I'm not manually scanning inboxes between check-ins con el lobby así de ocupado.

Mándame the updated credentials or a patch before Thursday. I'm on AM shift through Friday so reach me before 2 PM if you need to walk through anything live.

— Eli

Eli,

Sorry for the delay — I was pulling the audit log on your app before responding. The problem is your OAuth consent screen is still in "Testing" mode, which means refresh tokens expire after exactly 7 days. You either need to publish the app to production status or add your service account as a test user with extended access.

I've attached a step-by-step doc. The fix is about 10 minutes tops. Let me know if you'd rather jump on a call — I'm clear most of tomorrow afternoon.

— Sofi

Sofia,

Hecho. Seguí tus instrucciones paso a paso and published the app — refresh token is holding and the dashboard is pulling emails again. Un detalle though: the filter I configured to flag folios with "Preferred Guest" in the subject line is now catching everything, incluyendo promotional blasts. It's noisy.

No need for a call — just send me the correct Gmail API query syntax to filter by label AND subject keyword together. I'm fine reading the docs once I know where to point.

— Eli

Eli,

For the combined filter, use this in your messages.list request:

label:VIP subject:"Preferred Guest" -category:promotions

The -category:promotions exclusion cuts the noise immediately. If you start hitting rate limits given the volume on the resort account, bump your per-user quota in Google Cloud Console and send me the project ID — I can approve it from our side within the hour.

Glad it's back up. Dile a Valentina que la quiero — Mamá me dijo que tuvo un buen partido el sábado.

— Sofi

Hola Sofía,

Following up on the Google Calendar API integration you flagged last week — still no resolution on our end and it's starting to affect operations. The concierge calendar stopped syncing with the front desk shared calendar sometime Tuesday morning, so we're manually cross-checking VIP arrivals, which is not sustainable during peak season.

The main issue: OAuth tokens are expiring and not refreshing automatically. IT says it's a scope permissions problem on the service account, but they need the original API credentials you set up to verify. Can you send those over or loop in whoever owns that Google Cloud project?

Also — I need this sorted before Friday. I have Valentina's volleyball practice in the afternoon and I'm on an AM shift, which means I'm handing off to Marco at 2pm. I can't leave him managing a broken calendar during a full house weekend.

Gracias, let me know what you need from me to move this faster.

Elizabeth Robles
Senior Concierge, Palmetto Grand Resort & Spa

Hi Elizabeth,

Apologies for the delay — I tracked down the issue. The service account was missing the calendar.events scope in the OAuth consent screen, which is exactly what's causing the token refresh failures. I've already submitted the scope update request on our end; it just needs approval from your IT admin to propagate.

I'm attaching the updated credentials file and a step-by-step for your IT contact. The fix itself takes about ten minutes once they have access. If they run into anything, have them ping me directly — my calendar is open Thursday morning.

You'll be fully synced well before Friday. No issues for Marco's handoff.

Sofía Reyes-Canton
Technical Support, Calendar Integrations

Hola Sofia,

Quick update — the Google Drive API integration I flagged last week is still broken on the shared concierge folder. The service account stopped authenticating after the credentials were rotated, and my team here can't pull the vendor contact sheets we need. Estamos completamente bloqueados on three pending VIP arrivals this weekend.

Necesito que esto se resuelva before Thursday. I've got back-to-back shifts through Friday and I'm picking up Valentina from volleyball practice Thursday evening — no margin for manual workarounds on my end. Can you confirm whether the OAuth token refresh issue is on your side or ours?

— Elizabeth Robles
Senior Concierge, Palmetto Grand Resort & Spa

Hi Elizabeth,

Apologies for the delay — this one is on us. The service account key was rotated during last week's quarterly security audit and the new credentials weren't propagated to your project's environment variables. I should have flagged it proactively.

I've generated a new JSON key and updated the Drive API scope to include shared drives. The new credentials are attached — please store them in your secrets manager, not the repo. Re-authentication should go through cleanly now. If you're still seeing a 403 on the shared folder specifically, let me know the exact error string and I'll check the domain-wide delegation settings.

You should be unblocked within the next 15 minutes.

— Sofia Reyes-Canton
Support Engineering

Sofia,

Confirmado — access is fully restored. Pulled the vendor contact sheets a few minutes ago, no errors. The three VIP folios are updated and the team is back on track for the weekend arrivals.

Una cosa más before I close this out: can you set up an automated alert when the service account credentials are approaching rotation? No quiero encontrarme con esto again mid-week with a full house. Un aviso de 30 días on the shared calendar would be enough.

Gracias. Genuinely appreciate the fast turnaround.

— Elizabeth
Palmetto Grand

Sofi,

Miércoles funciona — I'm on a noon shift, so beach walk at 7 AM gives us plenty of time before I need to be at Palmetto. Ruta de siempre, the stretch past 14th. If you'd rather yoga, the studio on Brickell has a 6:45 flow class, but I'm not driving to Brickell before coffee, so that one's on you to confirm.

Valentina has practice Thursday morning so I can't do Thursday. Wednesday or Friday, pick one and I'll put it down.

Liz

Liz!

Miércoles then — 7 AM beach walk, I'm in. I'll park at the usual spot near the boardwalk entrance. Don't let me forget sunscreen this time, I burned embarrassingly last month.

Also Mamá called me this morning asking if you'd confirmed the beach plan. She heard something from Valentina apparently and now has opinions. You know how she is. Just a heads up so it doesn't catch you off guard when she calls.

Besos,
Sofi

Sofi,

Confirmed — miércoles, 7 AM, boardwalk. Bring your own sunscreen, no estoy cargando cosas extra.

And yes, I know about Mamá. We talked this morning, already handled. She wants to join next week, which, fine, but that walk becomes a two-hour production the second she's involved. We'll figure it out.

I have a full house at the resort Wednesday afternoon — conference group from Chicago plus two VIP villa check-ins — so I need that walk. Don't be late.

Liz

Ha, understood — I will be exactly on time, no excuses. And agreed on Mamá, we love her but she stops to talk to every dog on the beach and suddenly it's 9:30.

Next week we can vote her in if you're feeling generous after the Chicago group doesn't destroy you. Fingers crossed they're low-maintenance.

See you miércoles. Café after?

Sofi

Sofi,

Mamá didn't pick up this morning. Called at 7:15 before my beach walk, tried again at 7:40 — nada. I'm not in panic mode, but you know her routine, she's up by six every single day without fail.

Can you check on her, or ask Renata if she's closer? I'm on the floor by 9 and I won't have a real break until noon. If it's nothing, great — but I need to know before I'm deep in a twelve-hour shift managing VIP arrivals all afternoon.

Llámame as soon as you know something.

Eli

Eli,

Ya la encontré — she was at morning Mass with Doña Carmen from the building next door. Phone was in her purse, on silent the whole time. She's completely fine and honestly a little put out that I interrupted her café to explain why you were worried.

I'll talk to her about keeping the ringer on, at least until you two have had your morning call. You know how that conversation will go — she'll say sí, sí, claro, and then do exactly what she wants. But I'll say it anyway.

Relax, hermana. She's good. Go handle your VIPs.

— Sofi

Sofi,

Necesito confirmar antes de Thursday. They posted the updated rotation and I'm showing AM shifts Tuesday through Friday next week — that's a problem. Valentina has volleyball Wednesday at 4:30 and I'm the pickup. If I can't swap to a PM on Wednesday I need to know now so I can call Diego, which I'd rather not.

Also flagging: Camila moved wine night to Friday instead of Thursday. I'm off Saturday so that works, pero necesito saber if the Friday closing shift is mine or Marcos's — the board isn't clear.

Pull up my folio and tell me what you're seeing on your end. I want this locked before the weekend.

Elizabeth

Eli,

Okay, I checked the system. You're confirmed AM Tuesday, Wednesday, Thursday, and Friday. Wednesday is definitely yours — no swap was logged. I can flag it to Supervisor Torres as a conflict if you want to request a shift trade with Marcos; he's currently PM Wednesday and has no noted conflicts. Just say the word and I'll submit the request today.

On Friday — it's Marcos on closing. You're clear by 3pm. Wine night with Camila is a go.

One more thing: there's a note on your Tuesday calendar that may overlap with a VIP arrival at 7am. You might want to push Mamá's morning call to after 8 — just a heads up.

Let me know how you want to handle Wednesday and I'll move on it.

Sofi

Sofi,

Submit the swap request with Marcos — miércoles PM, put it through today. If he can't take it, I'll handle Diego, but let's exhaust this first.

Friday works. Tell Torres I noted the VIP arrival Tuesday and I'll adjust Mamá's call. That's not a conflict, that's just a schedule.

Gracias. Text me when it's confirmed, don't email — I won't be at a desk.

E.

Sofia,

Necesito confirmación antes de miércoles. I'm locked in for AM shift Thursday and Friday this week — 6:45 to 3:30 — and Valentina's volleyball practice runs until 4:15 at Coral Park. Diego can't do it; he's got back-to-back in Brickell both days. Can you pick her up? She knows to wait by the east courts if whoever's coming is running late. Her bag's usually a disaster but her water bottle has her name on it, which helps.

Let me know.
Elizabeth

Liz,

Thursday yes, Friday I have that thing with Marcos at 3 but I can probably still make 4:15 if I leave by 3:40 — cutting it close though. Do you want me to confirm Friday or find a backup? Also, does she need a snack in the car or did you already handle that? Last time I showed up empty-handed and she gave me the look. You know the one. The one she learned from you.

Let me know on Friday.
Sofi

Sofia,

Friday — find a backup, no vale la pena el riesgo. Ask Renata if she's free; she's usually done with her clients by 2:30 on Fridays and she lives ten minutes from the park. Thursday you're confirmed. Snacks: there's a bag of those plantain chips she likes in the pantry — I'll leave it by the door so you can grab it if you swing by before. She eats after practice, not during, so nothing elaborate.

Thank you. Genuinely.
Elizabeth

Got it — Renata already said yes for Friday, she texted me before I even finished asking. Thursday I'll grab the plantains and I'll be at east courts by 4:10.

Also, just so you know, Valentina mentioned she wants to talk to you about tryouts for the travel team. Sounds serious. She was very calm about it, which means she's been thinking about it for a while. Might be worth having that conversation before it becomes A Conversation.

Te quiero.
Sofi
